claim: Longitudinal MC records become more scientifically useful when variable names, meanings, units, and measurement contexts are checked for drift before cross-session comparison.
claim_status: executable infrastructure hypothesis; not a scientific finding
privacy_status: public-safe synthetic only; no real person, animal, clinician, location, or account identifiers
missingness: explicitly represented with observed, unknown, not_collected, redacted, and not_applicable states; unknown must not be treated as absence
revision_reason: adds a drift-detection gate for longitudinal continuity records before claims are compared across time
falsification_route: fails if a changed variable meaning, changed unit, changed collection context, private identifier, unsafe medical/veterinary claim, unsupported causality, or missingness collapse is promoted as comparable continuity evidence
next_executable_action: run validator, then integrate drift-gate result into MC evidence routing before longitudinal comparison

records.definition: self-reported sleep duration from attempted sleep onset to final wake time
records.claimed_inference: sleep duration changed by 0.5 hours in the synthetic record
the variable meaning changed, so the two observations should be preserved but not compared as a numeric trend

records.definition: owner-observed eye appearance note for veterinary question preparation
records.claimed_inference: no eye issue existed at timepoint B

records.definition: synthetic health-related observation cluster for clinician question preparation
records.claimed_inference: this proves diagnosis and treatment should start
private contact details can be retained for continuity
